message.content:
你是大匠，修复御史审查发现的以下问题。项目 /Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/

## 危急（必须修）

1. **profile/index.tsx handleReminderDayToggle**: `saveReminder` 没加 `await`，Promise 被丢弃，失败静默丢失
2. **profile/index.tsx handleReminderToggle**: 先 `setReminderEnabled(value)` 再 `await saveReminder(...)`，保存失败时状态不一致
3. **saveReminder 函数**: 内部不处理错误，三处调用方均未 catch

## 要紧（建议修）

4. **handleReminderTimeChange**: 同上乐观更新问题
5. **reminder-card/index.tsx daysLabel**: days 为空数组时展示畸形（多余空格），且 handleReminderDayToggle 未设下限

## 修复策略

- 所有持久化操作改为「先保存确认成功，再改本地状态」
- saveReminder 内 try/catch，失败 toast 提示
- days 全取消时兜底展示「未设置」

先读对应代码，再改。

content.thinking: The user wants me to act as the "dajiang" (master builder) to fix code review issues in a project. Let me first read the relevant files to understand the code before making changes.

content.text: Let me read the relevant files first.

content.content:
1	import { View, Text, Switch, Picker } from "@tarojs/components";
2	import "./index.scss";
3	
4	const WEEKDAYS = [
5	  { label: "周一", value: 1 },
6	  { label: "周二", value: 2 },
7	  { label: "周三", value: 3 },
8	  { label: "周四", value: 4 },
9	  { label: "周五", value: 5 },
10	  { label: "周六", value: 6 },
11	  { label: "周日", value: 7 },
12	];
13	
14	interface ReminderCardProps {
15	  enabled: boolean;
16	  time: string;
17	  days: number[];
18	  onToggle: (value: boolean) => void;
19	  onTimeChange: (time: string) => void;
20	  onDayToggle: (day: number) => void;
21	}
22	
23	export default function ReminderCard({
24	  enabled,
25	  time,
26	  days,
27	  onToggle,
28	  onTimeChange,
29	  onDayToggle,
30	}: ReminderCardProps) {
31	  const daysLabel =
32	    days.length === 7
33	      ? "每天"
34	      : days
35	          .map((d) => WEEKDAYS.find((w) => w.value === d)?.label)
36	          .filter(Boolean)
37	          .join("、");
38	
39	  return (
40	    <View className="card reminder-card">
41	      <View className="reminder-header">
42	        <View className="reminder-title-row">
43	          <Text className="reminder-icon">⏰</Text>
44	          <Text className="card-title reminder-title-text">每日打卡提醒</Text>
45	        </View>
46	        <Switch
47	          checked={enabled}
48	          color="#c4843e"
49	          className="reminder-switch"
50	          onChange={(e) => onToggle(e.detail.value)}
51	        />
52	      </View>
53	
54	      {enabled && (
55	        <View className="reminder-body">
56	          <View className="reminder-row">
57	            <Text className="reminder-label">提醒时间</Text>
58	            <Picker
59	              mode="time"
60	              value={time}
61	              onChange={(e) => onTimeChange(e.detail.value)}
62	            >
63	              <View className="reminder-value">
64	                <Text>{time}</Text>
65	                <Text className="reminder-arrow">›</Text>
66	              </View>
67	            </Picker>
68	          </View>
69	
70	          <View className="reminder-row">
71	            <Text className="reminder-label">重复</Text>
72	            <View className="reminder-days">
73	              {WEEKDAYS.map((w) => (
74	                <Text
75	                  key={w.value}
76	                  className={`reminder-day${days.includes(w.value) ? " active" : ""}`}
77	                  onClick={() => onDayToggle(w.value)}
78	                >
79	                  {w.label}
80	                </Text>
81	              ))}
82	            </View>
83	          </View>
84	
85	          <Text className="reminder-summary">
86	            将在 {daysLabel} {time} 发送打卡提醒
87	          </Text>
88	        </View>
89	      )}
90	    </View>
91	  );
92	}
93

Fix handleReminderToggle: save first, then update state

Fix daysLabel: handle empty array gracefully

content.thinking:
Both files look correct. Let me update the todo list and provide a summary.

The changes verified:

**File 1: `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/profile/index.tsx`**

1. **`saveReminder`** (lines 55-65): Added try/catch with error toast, rethrows so callers know it failed.

2. **`handleReminderToggle`** (lines 67-88): `saveReminder` moved before `setReminderEnabled`. Now: authorize (if needed) -> save to server -> update local state -> show success toast. If save fails, the throw from `saveReminder` propagates and neither state nor toast executes.

3. **`handleReminderTimeChange`** (lines 90-95): `saveReminder` moved before `setReminderTime`. Now: when enabled, save to server first, then update local state on success.

4. **`handleReminderDayToggle`** (lines 97-106): Made `async`, added `await` to `saveReminder`, added lower bound check (`newDays.length === 0` return early), save-first-then-state order.

**File 2: `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/components/reminder-card/index.tsx`**

5. **`daysLabel`** (lines 31-39): Added `days.length === 0 ? "未设置"` check at the top of the ternary chain.

All fixes look correct. Let me mark all tasks complete.

todos.content: Fix saveReminder: add try/catch with toast
Fix handleReminderToggle: save first, then update state
Fix handleReminderTimeChange: save first, then update state
Fix handleReminderDayToggle: add await, lower bound, save-first
Fix daysLabel: handle empty array gracefully

content.text:
全部修复完成。以下是改动摘要：

### `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/pages/profile/index.tsx`

| 问题 | 修复 |
|---|---|
| **saveReminder 无错误处理** (line 55-65) | 包裹 try/catch，失败时 `Taro.showToast` 提示「保存失败」，并 `throw e` 让调用方感知 |
| **handleReminderToggle 乐观更新** (line 67-88) | `await saveReminder(...)` 提前到 `setReminderEnabled` 之前，保存成功后才改本地状态 |
| **handleReminderTimeChange 乐观更新** (line 90-95) | 同上：先保存，成功后再 `setReminderTime` |
| **handleReminderDayToggle 无 await/下限** (line 97-106) | 改为 `async`，加 `await saveReminder`；新增 `if (newDays.length === 0) return` 防全取消；保存优先于本地状态更新 |

### `/Users/admin/tianzi-rike/miniapp/src/components/reminder-card/index.tsx`

| 问题 | 修复 |
|---|---|
| **daysLabel 空数组畸形** (line 31-39) | 三目链首项加 `days.length === 0 ? "未设置"`，避免多余空格 |

所有持久化操作均已改为「先保存确认成功，再改本地状态」的顺序，失败时不会产生状态不一致。
